memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from Eyton's Antiquities of Shropshire, Vol. X, p. 187

Richard Corbet (III), was married to a Lady named Petronilla, who is said to have brought the estates at Booley and Edgbolton to the Corbe …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire於大約1200年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特時，他的父親Richard Corbet29歲，母親Joanna de Toret6歲。他於1231年與Petronilla Booley在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1255年在英國史洛普爾享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire was born about 1200, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Corbet, was 29 and his mother, Joanna de Toret, was 6. He married Petronilla Booley in 1231, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1255, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 56.

ko.Moreton Toret, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 비 오스베스트리
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Corbet(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna de Toret(은)는 6세였다. 그는 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 Petronilla Booley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1255년 영국 슈럽실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Moreton Toret, Shropshire, England: моретон би освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire родился около 1200 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Corbet было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna de Toret, 6. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronilla Booley в 1231 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1255 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire nació aproximadamente 1200, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Corbet, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joanna de Toret, tenía 6 años. Se casó con Petronilla Booley en 1231, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1255, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
